# Floinvite

> Digital site access management for SMEs and venues. Zero hardware. 30-second visitor check-ins with instant host notifications.

Floinvite is a browser-based visitor management system built for small and medium-sized businesses. It replaces paper sign-in books and expensive kiosk hardware with a fast, professional check-in flow that works on any device — tablet, phone, or desktop.

## Key Features

- Walk-in and pre-registered visitor check-in (under 30 seconds)
- Instant email notifications to hosts on arrival
- Digital logbook with search, filter, and CSV/JSON export
- Host and employee directory management with CSV import
- Emergency evacuation accountability list
- Expected guest pre-registration and lookup
- Returning visitor recognition

## Pricing

- **Free tier**: 20 hosts/visitors — no credit card required
- **Starter**: $29/month — unlimited check-ins, email notifications, logbook export
- **Compliance+**: $49/month — audit-ready exports, SMS notifications, advanced reporting

## Industries Served

- Construction sites (contractor and subcontractor access control)
- Corporate offices (professional visitor management)
- Healthcare facilities (patient and visitor tracking)
- Co-working spaces (member and guest access)

## Pages

- [Home](https://floinvite.com/): Product overview and sign-up
- [Features](https://floinvite.com/features): Full feature breakdown
- [Pricing](https://floinvite.com/pricing): Plan comparison and checkout
- [Construction](https://floinvite.com/construction): Site access for construction
- [Offices](https://floinvite.com/offices): Corporate office visitor management
- [Healthcare](https://floinvite.com/healthcare): Healthcare facility access
- [Co-working](https://floinvite.com/coworking): Shared space management
- [Privacy Policy](https://floinvite.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://floinvite.com/terms)

## Technical

- Platform: Web (any modern browser)
- No hardware required — works on existing tablets or reception screens
- Data stored in browser (localStorage/IndexedDB) — no cloud dependency for core features
- Email notifications via backend API

## Contact

- Email: admin@floinvite.com
- Website: https://floinvite.com
